creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 251295
Patch for c-ares

Compile and runtime tested on FreeBSD 14.0-RELEASE (amd64) (make, make check-plist, make test)

Poudriere testport OK 14.0-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 13.2-RELEASE (amd64)

Tested with following users in Poudriere (13.2-RELEASE, amd64):
devel/google-cloud-cpp
devel/grpc
devel/py-gevent
devel/py-grpcio
devel/py-grpcio-tools
dns/https_dns_proxy
games/bzflag
games/bzflag-server
irc/ircproxy
irc/unreal
mail/greylite
net/frr8
net/frr9
net/megacmd
net/mosquitto
net/shadowsocks-libev
net/sipsak
net/wireshark
net-mgmt/xymon-server
security/bitwarden-cli (ignored, unrelated)
security/sssd
security/sssd2
security/zeek
www/envoy (fails, unrelated)
www/nghttp2 (fails, unrelated)
www/node18
www/node20
www/node21
www/node22
